questions.text: Outline any concerns regarding the impact of the Acquisition on competition. Are Henkel and ATP close competitors and what alternatives are available?
To what extent are non-water-based pressure-sensitive adhesive (PSA) tapes substitutable with water-based PSA tapes? Are there uses where they are not substitutable?

Outline any concerns regarding the impact of the Acquisition on Henkel’s potential ability and incentive to foreclose rival PSA tape suppliers by limiting access to its tapes and labels (T&L) adhesives?
Provide any additional information or comments that you consider relevant to the ACCC’s assessment of the Acquisition.
Provide a brief description of your business or organisation, including any commercial relationships with Henkel and/or ATP.
